mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND create_at >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
SELECT SUM(ov.duration) FROM task t INNER JOIN original_video ov ON t.original_video_id = ov.video_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT DATE(create_at) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM task WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND create_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_at) ORDER BY DATE(create_at)
SELECT * FROM task WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_at DESC, task_id DESC LIMIT 5
mapper.update:
UPDATE user
username = #{username},
password = #{password},
avatar = #{avatar},
email = #{email},
phone = #{phone},
detection_count = #{detection_count},
total_processed_videos = #{total_processed_videos},
total_2d_videos = #{total_2d_videos},
total_3d_videos = #{total_3d_videos},
current_storage = #{current_storage},
max_storage = #{max_storage},
created_at = #{created_at},
WHERE id = #{id}
